subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned toward the Abha Kingdom! That which thou hast written hath been noted; all was supplication and entreaty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت ابهی آنچه مرقوم نمودی ملحوظ نظر گردید همه تبتل و ابتهال بود و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
